subject: (no subject)
body: i received the library plan, ther needs to be a bedroom as it is a residence,, your office has ben told this repeatedly, the staris go down to a road, on both sides ,, what sense does that make, park you bike in the road,, walk down to a road, , I am embarresed for you,, ther is no place to sit , out of the wind, the sun will bake  the interior with no overhangs,,,, WHO is doing these plans.. ? WHAT is going on?
